rationale: Mathematics at L3 maps cleanly to the AMS Mathematical Subject Classification (MSC2020). Thirty-six leaves give each working community its name. I kept Geometry & Topology split into sub-areas because the working communities (differential, low-dim, symplectic, algebraic-topology) genuinely differ in tools and conferences. Probability is split between general theory and the modern hot areas (random matrices, SPDEs).

subfields.name: Group Theory & Representation Theory
subfields.tagline: Finite groups, Lie groups, representation theory, character theory.

subfields.name: Commutative & Homological Algebra
subfields.tagline: Commutative rings, modules, derived categories, homological methods.

subfields.name: Noncommutative Algebra
subfields.tagline: Noncommutative rings, operator algebras as algebra, Hopf algebras.

subfields.name: Schemes & Moduli Theory
subfields.tagline: Schemes, moduli spaces, Hilbert schemes, stacks.

subfields.name: Derived Algebraic Geometry & Higher Categories
subfields.tagline: Derived AG, higher stacks, ∞-categories applied to geometry.

subfields.name: Arithmetic Geometry
subfields.tagline: Arithmetic geometry, p-adic methods, Galois representations geometric.

subfields.name: Analytic Number Theory
subfields.tagline: Riemann zeta, L-functions, sieve methods, prime distribution.

subfields.name: Algebraic Number Theory
subfields.tagline: Galois cohomology, class field theory, arithmetic of number fields.

subfields.name: Automorphic Forms & Langlands
subfields.tagline: Automorphic forms, Langlands program, modular forms in arithmetic.

subfields.name: Harmonic & Fourier Analysis
subfields.tagline: Harmonic analysis, Calderón-Zygmund, oscillatory integrals.

subfields.name: Functional Analysis & Operator Theory
subfields.tagline: Functional analysis, operator theory, Banach algebra, free probability.

subfields.name: Complex Analysis & Complex Geometry
subfields.tagline: Several complex variables, complex geometry, pluripotential theory.

subfields.name: Nonlinear & Dispersive PDEs
subfields.tagline: Nonlinear Schrödinger, KdV, dispersive PDE regularity, wave equations.

subfields.name: Fluid PDE & Navier-Stokes Regularity
subfields.tagline: Navier-Stokes regularity, Euler, MHD PDE analysis.

subfields.name: Kinetic Theory & Transport Equations
subfields.tagline: Boltzmann, Vlasov, kinetic theory analysis, hyperbolic conservation laws.

subfields.name: Differential Geometry & Ricci Flow
subfields.tagline: Riemannian geometry, Ricci flow, geometric analysis on manifolds.

subfields.name: Low-Dimensional Topology & Knot Theory
subfields.tagline: 3- and 4-manifolds, knot theory, Floer homology, Khovanov.

subfields.name: Symplectic & Contact Geometry
subfields.tagline: Symplectic topology, contact geometry, Fukaya categories, mirror symmetry geometric.

subfields.name: Algebraic Topology & Homotopy Theory
subfields.tagline: Stable homotopy, chromatic homotopy, equivariant topology, spectra.

subfields.name: Extremal & Additive Combinatorics
subfields.tagline: Extremal combinatorics, additive combinatorics, Ramsey theory.

subfields.name: Algebraic & Enumerative Combinatorics
subfields.tagline: Algebraic combinatorics, symmetric functions, enumerative methods.

subfields.name: Structural & Probabilistic Graph Theory
subfields.tagline: Graph minors, probabilistic combinatorics, hypergraph regularity.

subfields.name: Model Theory
subfields.tagline: Model theory, NIP, o-minimality, applications to algebra.

subfields.name: Set Theory & Forcing
subfields.tagline: Set theory, large cardinals, forcing axioms, inner models.

subfields.name: Category & Higher Category Theory
subfields.tagline: Category theory, higher categories, homotopy type theory.

subfields.name: Random Matrix Theory & Integrable Probability
subfields.tagline: RMT, integrable probability, KPZ universality.

subfields.name: Stochastic Processes & SPDE
subfields.tagline: Markov processes, SDE/SPDE, percolation, interacting particle systems.

subfields.name: Large Deviations & Concentration
subfields.tagline: Large deviation theory, concentration inequalities, mean-field analysis.

subfields.name: Ergodic Theory & Smooth Dynamics
subfields.tagline: Ergodic theory, smooth dynamics, hyperbolic dynamics applications.

subfields.name: Complex & Arithmetic Dynamics
subfields.tagline: Holomorphic dynamics, arithmetic dynamics, KAM theory.

subfields.name: Finite Element & Spectral Methods
subfields.tagline: FEM theory and applications, spectral methods, isogeometric analysis.

subfields.name: Numerical Linear Algebra & Iterative Methods
subfields.tagline: Sparse direct solvers, Krylov, preconditioning, randomized NLA.

subfields.name: Convex Optimization (Theory)
subfields.tagline: Convex programming theory, interior-point, semidefinite programming.

subfields.name: Integer & Stochastic Optimization
subfields.tagline: Integer programming, stochastic optimization, robust optimization.

subfields.name: Mathematical Statistical Mechanics
subfields.tagline: Rigorous statistical mechanics, lattice models, exactly solvable models.

subfields.name: Mathematical Biology & Epidemiology
subfields.tagline: Mathematical ecology, infectious disease modeling, biological pattern formation.

uncovered_concerns: Combined some smaller MSC categories (e.g., game theory math, control theory) under Applied Math & Mathematical Biology at L2 — they'd be too thin alone at L3.
Algebraic topology lives under Geometry & Topology here even though MSC2020 separates them — modern algebraic topologists work tightly with geometric topologists.
